title_cn: 首达时间中的隐藏路径
subtitle_en: A recent research line on how random-walk hitting-time distributions encode fast and slow pathways.
subtitle_cn: 最近几个月推进的一条研究线：随机游走首达时间分布如何编码快慢路径。
audience_cn: 面向不同方向的 SMET PhD 听众
theme_en: Mechanism first, evidence second, outlook last.
theme_cn: 先讲机制，再给证据，最后落到下一步问题。

slides.title: Hidden Routes in First-Passage Time
slides.sentence: This talk studies how hitting-time distributions reveal hidden pathways in random-walk systems.
slides.question_en: What scientific question links the recent ring and 2D work?
slides.question_cn: 最近的 ring 和 2D 工作，到底被哪个科学问题串起来？

evidence.alt_en: Hero illustration for hidden routes in first-passage time
evidence.alt_cn: 首达时间隐藏路径的主视觉图

slides.title: What Is First-Passage Time?
slides.sentence: It is the first time a walker reaches a target.
slides.question_en: What quantity are we actually measuring?

slides.title: Why a Double Peak Matters
slides.sentence: A double peak suggests competing timescales or competing routes.
slides.question_en: Why look at the whole distribution instead of one average time?
slides.question_cn: 为什么要看整条分布，而不是只看一个平均时间？

slides.title: Single Target on a Ring
slides.sentence: In the simplest model, fast and slow branches already separate.
slides.question_en: How does a minimal single-target system produce two visible branches?
slides.question_cn: 最小单目标系统是怎样长出两个可见分支的？

slides.title: Route Design Changes the Distribution
slides.sentence: The second peak depends on how the route is configured, not just whether a shortcut exists.
slides.question_en: What did the recent single-target scans add beyond the minimal example?
slides.question_cn: 最近这几个月的单目标扫描，新增了什么信息？

evidence.alt_en: Peak-two weight versus shortcut destination in the ring model
evidence.alt_cn: ring 模型中第二峰权重随 shortcut 终点变化的图
evidence.caption_en: Changing the shortcut destination can strengthen, weaken, or nearly erase the late branch, so route design matters as much as route existence.
evidence.caption_cn: 改变 shortcut 终点会增强、削弱，甚至几乎抹去晚分支，所以关键不只是有没有 shortcut，而是怎样配置它。

slides.title: From a Ring to a 2D Geometry
slides.sentence: The same fast-slow logic survives, but geometry and boundaries now shape the branches.
slides.question_en: Does the same mechanism survive once the system becomes geometric?
slides.question_cn: 系统变成真正的几何问题以后，这个机制还在吗？

evidence.alt_en: One-target and two-target lattice geometries for the 2D transition
evidence.alt_cn: 二维从单目标到双目标的格点几何图

slides.title: Membrane Helps, but It Plateaus
slides.sentence: Increasing permeability raises the membrane-related share, but only up to about fifty percent.
slides.question_en: Why is membrane passage still not enough to explain the late peak by itself?
slides.question_cn: 为什么即使提高膜透度，也还不足以单独解释晚峰？

evidence.alt_en: Membrane permeability storyboard showing saturation near fifty percent
evidence.alt_cn: 半透膜透度扫描及五成左右平台化的示意图

slides.title: Two-Target and Multi-Target Mechanisms
slides.sentence: The next step is to understand how route competition and target competition combine.
slides.question_en: Where does this research line go next?
slides.question_cn: 这条研究线接下来最自然的方向是什么？

evidence.alt_en: Two-target and many-target physical mechanisms for bimodal first-passage behavior
evidence.alt_cn: 双目标与多目标下双峰首达机制的示意图
